description: Learn how to grill meats and vegetables for delicious flavor.

steps.instruction: Preheat your grill to medium-high heat.
Prepare your ingredients: marinated meats or vegetables.
Oil the grill grates to prevent sticking.
Place the ingredients on the grill and close the lid.
Grill for 4-6 minutes per side, depending on thickness.
Check for doneness using a meat thermometer for meats.
Remove from the grill and let rest before serving.
